message:
Gate handle_request() behind #[cfg(test)] to suppress dead-code warning

handle_request() in pages/preview.rs is a test-only convenience wrapper
around handle_request_with_site_root() that canonicalizes the site
directory before delegating. It is not called from production code paths
(the actual server uses handle_request_with_site_root directly), so
marking it cfg(test) eliminates the dead_code lint without removing a
useful test helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
